summary:
Ameloblastoma histologically resembles other odontogenic epithelial tumors like ameloblastic fibroma, characterized by small cord- or island-like arrangements of epithelium within a dense stromal background. It does not resemble basal cell carcinoma, which shows distinct basaloid morphology with perinuclear haloes—features not present in ameloblastoma according to reviewed literature.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to two sentences focusing solely on clinically accurate, directly-supported histopathological comparisons.)
